data.title: SBS, PRISA, and CARACOL RADIO partner to expand US Hispanic market with debut of FM formats and streaming on LaMusica App. Target: $4 trillion market.
data.description: A partnership has been formed to tap into the rapidly expanding United States Hispanic market valued at over $4 trillion. The initiative includes the introduction of new FM radio formats and the launch of live/on-demand streaming on the LaMusica app. This collaboration involves Spanish Broadcasting System ("SBS"), a prominent Latino radio owner/operator. The announcement was made jointly in Miami, Madrid, and Bogotá on January 15, 2026.

data.title: Mitsubishi Motors loans a 2025 Outlander Plug-in Hybrid SUV to Tennessee nonprofit Cumberland River Compact to support their environmental initiatives.
data.description: Mitsubishi Motors North America, Inc. is supporting the Cumberland River Compact by lending a 2025 Mitsubishi Outlander Plug-in Hybrid SUV for a year. This vehicle will aid the organization in its endeavors related to education, restoration, and outreach in Tennessee. The Cumberland River Compact's work contributes to the conservation of the region's natural resources and ecosystems. Mitsubishi's Community Utility Vehicle program continues to make a positive impact through partnerships like this, showcasing their commitment to sustainability and community support.

data.title: Wet Brush launches Frizz-Free Detangler with advanced ionic infusion tech for smooth, sleek hair. #1 detangling brand worldwide.
data.description: Cutting-edge patented ionic infusion technology has introduced a new level of hair smoothness and sleekness in the bustling city of New York on January 15, 2026. Wet Brush, a renowned brand specializing in detangling solutions, has launched its groundbreaking product, the Wet Brush® Frizz-Free. As the number one trusted detangling hairbrush brand globally, catering to millions of customers, Wet Brush continues to revolutionize the industry with its innovative offerings.

data.title: NCC releases free Monograph on Fetal Assessment and Safe Care During Labor for all health care professionals.
data.description: The National Certification Corporation (NCC) recently announced the launch of their latest Monograph titled Fetal Assessment and Safe Care During Labor. This publication is now accessible to healthcare professionals at no cost. Created by...

data.title: US crypto market bill stalled as disagreements among lawmakers and crypto companies halt progress in Senate.
data.description: Disagreements among key lawmakers and influential cryptocurrency firms have led to a delay in the US Senate's consideration of the crypto market structure bill.

data.title: KiddeFenwal introduces NATURA™ Micro for commercial & industrial fire protection. Compact design, eco-friendly with zero-residue.
data.description: KiddeFenwal, a top player in the fire suppression and safety controls sector, is growing its fire protection offerings by introducing NATURA™ Micro. This new product, part of their inert gas systems under the Kidde Fire Systems brand, delivers advanced fire protection in a compact form. NATURA™ Micro ensures swift, residue-free, eco-conscious, and low-maintenance safeguarding. This launch reinforces KiddeFenwal's position as an industry leader, offering cutting-edge solutions for fire protection needs.

data.title: AGI CEO Paul Householder steps down due to personal reasons, replaced by Paul Brisebois as interim president.
data.description: Ag Growth International Inc. (TSX: AFN) announced that Paul Householder has resigned as President and CEO due to personal reasons, with immediate effect. Householder has also stepped down from AGI's Board of Directors. The company has appointed Paul Brisebois, the current Senior Vice President of North America Farm and Global Portables, as the Interim President.

data.title: John and Mable Ringling Museum of Art and FSU celebrate 25 years of partnership and stewardship, leading to major restoration and record public engagement.
data.description: Over the past 25 years, FSU governance has spearheaded significant efforts in restoring and expanding operations, resulting in unprecedented levels of public involvement. Located in Sarasota and Tallahassee, Florida, as of January 15, 2026, The Ringling, which serves as the State Art Museum of Florida, has experienced remarkable growth and restoration under FSU's management.

data.title: RealNex and CRE Marketing Hub join forces to advance AI innovation in commercial real estate, aiming for industry growth.
data.description: In Stafford, Texas on January 15, 2026, RealNex, a prominent provider of commercial real estate technology solutions, revealed a new strategic partnership with CRE Marketing Hub. This platform is known for its innovative use of AI to enhance marketing efforts and productivity in the commercial real estate sector. This announcement marks a significant development in the industry as these two companies come together to leverage their expertise and technology.

data.title: AFCPE announces 2025 award recipients for financial education, research, and practice at their symposium in Phoenix–Glendale.
data.description: In January 15, 2026, in Westerville, Ohio, the Association for Financial Counseling and Planning Education® (AFCPE®) celebrated exceptional individuals and initiatives at the 2025 AFCPE Symposium, which took place from November 18 to 20 in Phoenix–Glendale, Arizona. This event acknowledged noteworthy contributions in the financial sector through prestigious awards.

data.title: WorkCompCollege.com partners with Montana State Fund for 10 years to provide professional development platform.
data.description: In Lakewood Ranch, Florida, on January 15, 2026, WorkCompCollege.com, a division of Workers' Compensation Educational Services, LLC, revealed a significant collaboration with Montana State Fund. The agreement spans over a decade and focuses on providing a tailored professional growth platform.

data.title: New Zealand's Crossware acquires Germany's CI Solutions GmbH in multimillion-dollar deal for European expansion.
data.description: In a significant move to expand its footprint in the European Union (EU), the top email signature provider, Crossware, based in Auckland, New Zealand, has successfully completed the acquisition of CI Solutions GmbH, a company headquartered in Germany. The multimillion-dollar acquisition marks a strategic effort by Crossware to strengthen its position in the EU market. Crossware's acquisition of CI Solutions GmbH represents a crucial step in their growth strategy, with a focus on further establishing their presence in Europe.

data.title: Virtual filmmaking workshop by Butterfly Noir Inc. offers emerging filmmakers 6-week crash course with tools, strategies, and on-set experience using minimal resources.
data.description: A non-profit arts organization, Butterfly Noir Inc., based in New York, is offering a six-week crash course aimed at providing emerging filmmakers with essential tools, strategies, and hands-on experience on set. The program aims to equip participants with skills to work with minimal resources. This initiative comes as part of the organization's efforts to bridge the opportunity gap for artists. The course, starting on January 15, 2026, will provide valuable industry knowledge and practical experience to aspiring filmmakers.

data.title: New Venture Escrow expands into Los Angeles, California, marking its presence in the state's largest market.
data.description: In Los Angeles, California, on January 15, 2026, New Venture Escrow, a prominent independent escrow company known for its agent-focused approach and innovative technology, revealed the launch of its latest office. This expansion in Los Angeles is led by a seasoned team with a strong focus on providing excellent service.
Fed's Goolsbee: Growth is solid.

data.title: Dionis, a 40-year goat milk skincare leader, launches 7 new products including Body Butter collection.
data.description: In Bucks County, Pennsylvania, on January 15, 2026, Dionis Goat Milk Skincare, a well-established clean beauty brand known for its expertise in goat milk-based products for over 40 years, has announced the launch of seven new products. The expansion includes additions to their product line such as the Goat Milk Body Butter collection and a new "Freshly..." line. This brings the total number of SKUs offered by the brand to a diverse range of options for consumers.
